decision.summary: Open the April 15 BTC 73k dip market; no existing or floor action is warranted.
decision.rationale: Beecthor’s latest transcript and summary keep the active thesis bearish after the 76k rejection, still treating the rebound as corrective and favoring another leg down unless BTC reclaims 75k-76k. Binance supports that execution reality now: BTC is 73915.99, well off the 76038.0 high, trading near the 24h low, with shorts still dominant. Under nearest-strike-first, the 74k dip line is already too expensive and blocked by the >=85% cap, so the next conservative downside target is `will-bitcoin-dip-to-73k-on-april-15` at 60.0%, which fits the preferred band and aligns with the thesis; weekly downside markets are too discounted and floor markets are below the allowed Yes range.

details.market: Will Bitcoin dip to $73,000 on April 15?
